text:
Perfect! The airdrops tab has already been removed. Here's the current state:

✅ **Airdrops Tab Removed:**
- No "Airdrops" tab trigger
- No airdrops TabsContent
- Tabs are now 5 columns (Portfolio, Swap, Batch, Revoke, History)

✅ **Airdrops Accessible Via:**
- Gift icon button in the header (with notification badge)
- Opens a dialog when clicked
- Shows all claimable airdrops in the dialog

The airdrops feature is now exclusively accessible through the gift icon 🎁 button, not as a tab. This was done earlier when you requested to remove the tab and show airdrops only after clicking the gift icon.
